@graph.name: Aegis
@graph.description: Free online utility toolkit for passwords, JSON formatting, QR codes, encoding, hashing, timestamps, random numbers, and unit conversion.

@graph.name: Aegis
@graph.description: Free browser-based utility toolkit with password generation, JSON formatting, QR codes, encoding, hashing, timestamps, random numbers, and unit conversion.

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Aegis is a free browser-based utility toolkit.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to install anything to use Aegis?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Aegis runs as a static website in the browser without installation.

mainEntity.name: Does Aegis store my tool activity?

acceptedAnswer.text: Aegis stores device-local preferences such as theme, favorites, recent tools, and saved presets in the browser so the workspace can remember them between visits.

mainEntity.name: Why might the speed test be unavailable?

acceptedAnswer.text: The speed test stays unavailable until speed-test-config.json points at working latency, download, and upload endpoints with the right CORS and cache settings.
